metadata.homeTitle: Jungle Wildlife Tours · Manuel Antonio, Costa Rica
metadata.homeDescription: Nature and wildlife tours in Manuel Antonio and Quepos. Ground safari, mangrove kayak on Damas Island, and night walk with an ICT-certified guide.

hero.title: Real wildlife, canopy-level view
hero.description: We are ICT-certified guides in the Manuel Antonio and Quepos area. Choose between a ground safari, a mangrove kayak, or a night walk to see the wildlife others only imagine.

tours.title: Our tours
tours.subtitle: Choose the experience that best fits your day in the jungle.

tourDetail.noImages: Photos for this tour will be added soon.

mangrovePlaceholder.title: Mangrove kayak · Damas Island
mangrovePlaceholder.note: There are no real photos for this tour yet. We will replace them with mangrove images once they are available.

about.title: About us
about.intro: We are a local nature tour company in Manuel Antonio and Quepos, focused on real wildlife experiences in Costa Rica's central Pacific region.
about.story: We were born here and operate here. We are not a travel agency or an intermediary: the guide who meets you is the same person who knows the trails, channels, and local wildlife habits.

certifications.ict: Guide certification issued by the ICT

contact.subtitle: Have questions or want to book directly? Write to us.
